heading: Rule of construction
label: 1741f Rule of construction
text: Nothing in this subchapter may be construed to authorize a private right of action.
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act” and was translated as reading “this subtitle”, meaning subtitle A (§§ 301–308) of title III of div. FF of , , , known as the Robert Levinson Hostage Recovery and Hostage-Taking Accountability Act, which enacted this subchapter, to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. L. 116–260134 Stat. 3091Dec. 27, 2020
